creator: vova@plugcom.ru
text:
after intstalling port (or package) gcc28
g++ shows errors:

# g++
/usr/lib/crt1.o: In function `_start':
/usr/lib/crt1.o(.text+0x49): undefined reference to `main'
/usr/lib/libstdc++.so: undefined reference to `__unwind_function'
/usr/lib/libstdc++.so: undefined reference to `__find_first_exception_table_match'
/usr/lib/libstdc++.so: undefined reference to `__register_exceptions'

but, if g++ called only for compaling (no linking - g++ -c) all works:

# g++ -v
Reading specs from /usr/local/lib/gcc-lib/i386-unknown-freebsdelf3.0/2.8.1/specs
gcc version 2.8.1
# g++ -c
g++: No input files
# g++ -c aa.cc
# gcc -o aa aa.o
# ./aa
ok
#
g++ -c aa.cc

Fix: 

instead of g++ -o any any.cc use 
g++ -c any.cc && gcc -o any any.o
How-To-Repeat: # pkg_add gcc-2.8.1.tgz
# g++28
